snippet.title: Highlights stages 1-4 / WRC Croatia Rally 2021
snippet.description:
Kalle Rovanper√§ crashing on SS1, what a disappointing start for the young championship leader...
Follow the event live on WRC.com: https://www.wrc.com/en/wrcplus/live-timing/

More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com‚Äč

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/‚Äč

Find out about the official WRC video game on PC, XBox, Playstation and Nintendo Consoles here.
https://www.wrcthegame.com‚Äč

eSports WRC Championship, is open to anyone, driving on the same roads and stages as the real-life WRC.
https://www.wrc.com/en/more/gaming/es...‚Äč

Rally Fan? Merch, clothing and more at the official shop of the FIA World Rally Championship.
https://shop.wrc.com/‚Äč

Subscribe to this YouTube Channel for exclusive, frequent new rally videos.
https://www.youtube.com/user/wrc?sub_...‚Äč

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/WorldRally‚Äč

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/‚Äč

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC‚Äč

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by F√©d√©ration Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter R√∂hrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott T√§nak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi M√§kinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Gr√∂nholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with S√©bastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion S√©bastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi R√§ikk√∂nen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018 and 2020. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com

snippet.title: Rally Croatia: High Speed Highlights From Day 1 | WRC 2021
snippet.description:
‚Ėļ Watch Rally Croatia on Red Bull TV: http://win.gs/rallycroatia

Thierry Neuville leads the Croatia Rally after a pulsating opening leg.

This morning‚Äôs four special stages belonged to the Belgian. He won three to lead this third round of the FIA World Rally Championship by 7.4sec at mid-leg service in his Hyundai i20.

World champion S√©bastien Ogier fought back this afternoon when the tests were repeated. He won three in a row, the middle of which marked his 600th WRC stage victory, to overhaul Toyota Yaris team-mate Elfyn Evans for second.

Neuville ended 7.7sec clear of the Frenchman, with Evans three-tenths back in third.

Such was the fast and furious pace at Croatia‚Äôs WRC debut that both Neuville and Ogier survived close calls. Neuville‚Äôs i20 was pitched onto two wheels after hitting a bank in the final test, while Ogier escaped after clouting the banking in the opener.

Kalle Rovanper√§ suffered more than both. The youngest driver ever to lead the WRC at 20 drifted wide on a right bend 5.4km into the opening Rude ‚Äď PleŇ°ivica test where Ogier was so fortunate. His Yaris plunged down a bank, coming to rest against a tree and the car was damaged too severely to restart tomorrow.

‚ÄúIt was the last downhill section which was really slippery. I lost the car already in the entry of the corner, I never made the proper racing line and we went straight off. A bit too much speed and understeer and that‚Äôs the result, my mistake,‚ÄĚ Rovanper√§ admitted.

Although it was dry and warm, the stages south-west of capital city Zagreb became increasingly slippery as drivers cutting corners dragged gravel onto the asphalt. Rovanper√§‚Äôs demise left Neuville to open the roads with the best grip.

‚ÄúIt was a tough day for everybody,‚ÄĚ said Neuville. ‚ÄúThis morning when Kalle went off, our main goal was to try to benefit from a good road position and try to make some gap to the others which we managed to do. This afternoon I tried to extend, but struggled a bit in some places when there was a lot of gravel.‚ÄĚ

Evans was sandwiched by Neuville and Ogier before sliding to third in the closing stage, having prevented a Neuville clean sweep this morning by winning SS3.

Ott T√§nak was the only driver to choose Pirelli‚Äôs hard compound P Zero tyres solely this morning and the Estonian could not get the best out of them in his i20. Set-up changes improved his feeling this afternoon and he won one stage, without ever being comfortable.

He ended fourth, 31.9sec behind Neuville and 22.9sec clear of a deflated Craig Breen, who never found his rhythm on his first all-asphalt WRC rally since 2018.

Adrien Fourmaux was buzzing after an impressive drive to sixth in a Ford Fiesta in his top-flight debut.

Saturday‚Äôs second leg is the longest of the weekend at 121.92km. It is based in the same area as today, traversing stunning springtime scenery in the ŇĹumberak nature park. Four morning stages are repeated in the afternoon after service in Zagreb.

Leading positions after day 1

1. T Neuville / M Wydaeghe BEL Hyundai i20 55min 36.8sec
2. S Ogier / J Ingrassia FRA Toyota Yaris +7.7sec
3. E Evans / S Martin GBR Toyota Yaris +8.0sec
4. O T√§nak / M J√§rveoja EST Hyundai i20 +31.9sec
5. C Breen / P Nagle IRL Hyundai i20 +54.8sec
6. A Fourmaux / R Jamoul FRA Ford Fiesta +1min 14.7sec
#rallycroatia #rally #wrc

snippet.title: Shakedown LIVE - WRC Croatia Rally 2021
snippet.description:
Don¬īt miss WRC round 3 LIVE on wrcplus.com 22 - 25 April ūüá≠ūüá∑ 

More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/WorldRally

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by F√©d√©ration Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter R√∂hrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott T√§nak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi M√§kinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Gr√∂nholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with S√©bastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion S√©bastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi R√§ikk√∂nen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com

snippet.description:

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LYRICS:
As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom. 
First, can someone who's been vaccinated 
still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Sedim kuńái cele nońái maskiran
Svetom vlada ńćudna epidemija
ńĆekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piŇ°e LOCK DOWN,
VidiŇ° na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ńćini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ńćekamo
Da me grliŇ° hońáu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Jo, jo, jo, jo...
Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

SluŇ°aj malo doktore na vestima
Ň†ta ńáe dalje biti baŇ° me zanima
ńĆekaj, hani, hani, da prońĎu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoŇ° samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reńć
Punińćemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beńć.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je ńźole ńźogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je Ň°to smo sami,
Ne moŇĺemo vani
Zato dońĎi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaŇ° mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Zahvaljujemo se:
ūüéĶ Antonu
ūüéĶ Marku D.
ūüéĶ ŇĹiki P.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St George‚Äôs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

localized.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
localized.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St George‚Äôs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

hr.title: KoŇ°arkaŇ° kontrolira Dianu | Ljubomora u tinejdŇĺerskim vezama
hr.description:
Ljubomora vrlo ńćesto kvari dobar odnos, a to se Diani dogodilo. KoŇ°arkaŇ° kontrolira Dianin svaki korak, a rekao je i da joj treba frizura. snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
AranŇĺman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviic‚Äč‚Äč

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: Pravili ovaj kolańć? Ne ńćekajte ni minute sve imate za njega! Peńćeni kolańć sa pudingom od vanile.
snippet.description:
Lako, brzo i jeftino napravite ukusan kolańć od vanile i mekane piŇ°kote.
Recept ne smete propustiti. Podelite i sa drugima da vide kako je fin kolańć.
#vanila #kolac #recept
jeftino
brzo
lako
serpica recepti

Recept na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/04/peceni-kolac-sa-pudingom-od-vanile.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- 4 jajeta
- 8 kaŇ°ika Ň°eńáera
- 2 vanilin Ň°eńáera
- 15 kaŇ°ika mleka
- 10 kaŇ°ika ulja
- 15 kaŇ°ika braŇ°na
- 1 praŇ°ak za pecivo (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. mleka
- 2 pudinga od vanile 
- 5 kaŇ°ike Ň°eńáera

Ň†eńáer za posipanje i po Ňĺelji vońáe, Ň°lag...umuńáena kisela pavlaka, Ň°lag i vońáe ili umuńáen Ň°lag sa jogurtom i po Ňĺelji opet vońáe ūüėÄ

Ukljuńćite rernu na 180 stepeni, tepsiju preńćnika 35x20 obloŇĺite uljem i braŇ°nom.
Umutite jaja sa Ň°eńáerom i vanilom, dodajte mleko, ulje braŇ°no, praŇ°ak za pecivo i kratko umutite dok se sve ne izmeŇ°a.
Polovinu smese sipajte u pleh i pecite oko 10 minuta (ne duŇĺe).
Za to vreme skuvajte puding.
Vruńá puding prelijte preko vruńáeg kolańća, prekrijte ostatkom testa i vratite u rernu da se zapeńće oko pola sata.
Vruńá kolańć po Ňĺelji moŇĺete posuti kristal Ň°eńáerom i ostaviti da se ohladi. Iseńái i uŇĺivati! Prijatno!
RAZNI RECEPTI - BIRAJTE

de.title: Schnelle Rezepte. Es wird dich begeistern! Gebackener Kuchen mit Vanillepudding.
de.description:
Machen Sie einfach, schnell und kosteng√ľnstig einen k√∂stlichen Vanillekuchen und weiche Kekse.
Sie d√ľrfen das Rezept nicht verpassen. Teilen Sie mit anderen, um zu sehen, wie sch√∂n der Kuchen ist.
#vanilla #cake #recipe
billig
schnell
einfach
Serpica Rezepte

Zutaten und Zubereitung:

- 4 Eier
- 8 Essl√∂ffel Zucker
- 2 Vanillezucker
- 15 Essl√∂ffel Milch
- 10 Essl√∂ffel √Ėl
- 15 Essl√∂ffel Mehl
- 1 Backpulver (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. Milch
- 2 Vanillepuddings
- 5 Essl√∂ffel Zucker

Streuen Sie Zucker und, falls gew√ľnscht, Obst, Schlagsahne ... Sauerrahm, Schlagsahne und Obst oder Schlagsahne mit Joghurt und, falls gew√ľnscht, wieder Obst ūüėÄ

Drehen Sie den Ofen auf 180 Grad und bedecken Sie die Pfanne mit einem Durchmesser von 35 x 20 mit √Ėl und Mehl.
Eier mit Zucker und Vanille schlagen, Milch, √Ėl, Mehl, Backpulver hinzuf√ľgen und kurz schlagen, bis alles vermischt ist.
Gie√üen Sie die H√§lfte der Mischung in eine Pfanne und backen Sie sie etwa 10 Minuten lang (nicht mehr).
In der Zwischenzeit den Pudding kochen.
Gie√üen Sie den hei√üen Pudding √ľber den hei√üen Kuchen, bedecken Sie ihn mit dem Rest des Teigs und kehren Sie zum Backen in den Ofen zur√ľck, um etwa eine halbe Stunde lang zu backen.
Auf Wunsch k√∂nnen Sie den hei√üen Kuchen mit Kristallzucker bestreuen und abk√ľhlen lassen. Schneiden und genie√üen! Angenehm!

Recept na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/04/peceni-kolac-sa-pudingom-od-vanile.html

Sastojci i priprema:

- 4 jajeta
- 8 kaŇ°ika Ň°eńáera
- 2 vanilin Ň°eńáera
- 15 kaŇ°ika mleka
- 10 kaŇ°ika ulja
- 15 kaŇ°ika braŇ°na
- 1 praŇ°ak za pecivo (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. mleka
- 2 pudinga od vanile 
- 5 kaŇ°ike Ň°eńáera

Ň†eńáer za posipanje i po Ňĺelji vońáe, Ň°lag...umuńáena kisela pavlaka, Ň°lag i vońáe ili umuńáen Ň°lag sa jogurtom i po Ňĺelji opet vońáe ūüėÄ

Ukljuńćite rernu na 180 stepeni, tepsiju preńćnika 35x20 obloŇĺite uljem i braŇ°nom.
Umutite jaja sa Ň°eńáerom i vanilom, dodajte mleko, ulje braŇ°no, praŇ°ak za pecivo i kratko umutite dok se sve ne izmeŇ°a.
Polovinu smese sipajte u pleh i pecite oko 10 minuta (ne duŇĺe).
Za to vreme skuvajte puding.
Vruńá puding prelijte preko vruńáeg kolańća, prekrijte ostatkom testa i vratite u rernu da se zapeńće oko pola sata.
Vruńá kolańć po Ňĺelji moŇĺete posuti kristal Ň°eńáerom i ostaviti da se ohladi. Iseńái i uŇĺivati! Prijatno!

es.title: Recetas r√°pidas. ¬°Te encantar√°! Bizcocho al horno con pudin de vainilla.
es.description:
Haz un delicioso bizcocho de vainilla y bizcochos suaves de forma f√°cil, r√°pida y econ√≥mica.
No debes perderte la receta. Comp√°rtelo con otros para ver lo bonito que es el pastel.
# vainilla # pastel # receta
barato
r√°pido
f√°cil
recetas serpica

Ingredientes y preparaci√≥n:

- 4 huevos
- 8 cucharadas de az√ļcar
- 2 az√ļcares de vainilla
- 15 cucharadas de leche
- 10 cucharadas de aceite
- 15 cucharadas de harina
- 1 polvo de hornear (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. Leche
- 2 budines de vainilla
- 5 cucharadas de az√ļcar

Espolvoree az√ļcar y, si lo desea, fruta, nata montada ... nata agria batida, nata montada y fruta o nata montada con yogur y, si lo desea, fruta de nuevo ūüėÄ

Gire el horno a 180 grados, cubra la sart√©n de 35x20 de di√°metro con aceite y harina.
Batir los huevos con el az√ļcar y la vainilla, agregar la leche, el aceite, la harina, la levadura en polvo y batir brevemente hasta que todo est√© mezclado.
Vierta la mitad de la mezcla en una sart√©n y hornee por unos 10 minutos (no m√°s).
Mientras tanto, cocine el pud√≠n.
Vierta el bud√≠n caliente sobre el bizcocho caliente, cubra con el resto de la masa y vuelva al horno para hornear durante media hora aproximadamente.
Si lo desea, puede espolvorear el hot cake con az√ļcar glass y dejarlo enfriar. ¬°Corta y disfruta! ¬°Agradable!

it.title: Ricette veloci. Ti delizier√†! Torta al forno con budino alla vaniglia.
it.description:
Prepara una deliziosa torta alla vaniglia e biscotti morbidi in modo facile, veloce ed economico.
Non devi perderti la ricetta. Condividi con gli altri per vedere quanto √® bella la torta.
#vaniglia #cake #ricetta
a buon mercato
veloce
facile
ricette serpica

Ingredienti e preparazione:

- 4 uova
- 8 cucchiai di zucchero
- 2 zuccheri vanigliati
- 15 cucchiai di latte
- 10 cucchiai di olio
- 15 cucchiai di farina
- 1 lievito per dolci (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. latte
- 2 budini alla vaniglia
- 5 cucchiai di zucchero

Cospargere di zucchero e, se lo si desidera, frutta, panna montata ... panna acida montata, panna montata e frutta o panna montata con yogurt e, se lo si desidera, ancora frutta ūüėÄ

Accendere il forno a 180 gradi, coprire la teglia diametro 35x20 con olio e farina.
Sbattere le uova con lo zucchero e la vaniglia, aggiungere il latte, l'olio, la farina, il lievito e sbattere brevemente fino ad amalgamare il tutto.
Versate met√† del composto in una padella e infornate per circa 10 minuti (non di pi√Ļ).
Nel frattempo cuocere il budino.
Versate il budino caldo sulla torta calda, coprite con il resto dell'impasto e rimettete in forno a cuocere per circa mezz'ora.
Se lo desideri, puoi spolverare la torta calda con zucchero cristallino e lasciarla raffreddare. Taglia e divertiti! Piacevole!

en.title: Did you make this cake? Don't wait, you have all the ingredients. Baked cake with vanilla pudding.
en.description:
Make a delicious vanilla cake and soft biscuits easily, quickly and cheaply.
You must not miss the recipe. Share with others to see how nice the cake is.
#vanilla #cake #recipe
cheap
fast
easy
serpica recipes
Don‚Äôt wait a minute you have everything for him! Baked cake with vanilla pudding.

Make a delicious vanilla cake and soft biscuits easily, quickly and cheaply.
You must not miss the recipe. Share with others to see how nice the cake is.
#vanilla #cake #recipe
cheap
fast
easy
serpica recipes

Ingredients and preparation:

- 4 eggs
- 8 tablespoons of sugar
- 2 vanilla sugars
- 15 tablespoons of milk
- 10 tablespoons of oil
- 15 tablespoons of flour
- 1 baking powder (10 gr.)

- 700 ml. milk
- 2 vanilla puddings
- 5 tablespoons of sugar

Sprinkle sugar and fruit if desired, whipped cream ... whipped sour cream, whipped cream and fruit or whipped cream with yoghurt and fruit again if desired ūüėÄ

Turn the oven to 180 degrees, cover the 35x20 diameter pan with oil and flour.
Beat eggs with sugar and vanilla, add milk, oil, flour, baking powder and beat briefly until everything is mixed.
Pour half of the mixture into a pan and bake for about 10 minutes (no longer).
Meanwhile, cook the pudding.
Pour the hot pudding over the hot cake, cover with the rest of the dough and return to the oven to bake for about half an hour.
If desired, you can sprinkle the hot cake with crystal sugar and leave it to cool. Cut and enjoy! Pleasant!

snippet.title: Crew-2 Mission | Launch
snippet.description:
SpaceX and NASA are targeting Friday, April 23 for Falcon 9‚Äôs launch of Dragon‚Äôs second six-month operational crew mission (Crew-2) to the International Space Station (ISS) from historic Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) at NASA‚Äôs Kennedy Space Center in Florida. The instantaneous launch window opens at 5:49 a.m. EDT, 9:49 UTC, with a backup opportunity available on Monday, April 26 at 4:38 a.m. EDT, 8:38 UTC. 

Following stage separation, Falcon 9‚Äôs first stage will land on the ‚ÄúOf Course I Still Love You‚ÄĚ droneship, which will be stationed in the Atlantic Ocean. On Saturday, April 24, at approximately 5:10 a.m. EDT, 9:10 UTC, Dragon is expected to autonomously dock with the International Space Station.

This is the first human spaceflight mission to fly astronauts on a flight-proven Falcon 9 and Dragon. The Falcon 9 first stage supporting this mission previously launched the Crew-1 mission in November 2020 and the Dragon spacecraft previously flew Robert Behnken and Douglas Hurley to and from the International Space Station during SpaceX‚Äôs Demo-2 mission in 2020. 

The webcast will go live approximately 4 hours ahead of launch.

snippet.title: NebojŇ°a Vukanovińá: Povlańćim se iz svih razgovora sa opozicijom
snippet.description:
NebojŇ°a Vukanovińá, poslanik u Narodnoj skupŇ°tini Republike Srpske tokom razgovora u Danu uŇĺivo otkrio je Ň°ta je zamjerio DraŇ°ku Stanivukovińáu, gradonańćelniku Banjaluke. Poruńćio je i prvom ńćovjeku Srbije Aleksandru Vuńćińáu da, ako je Srbin i patriota, prestane podrŇĺavati lidera SNSD-a Milorada Dodika. Vukanovińá je naveo kako ga ne zanimaju funkcije i da se povlańći iz svih razgovora sa opozicijom. "Kad se sve dogovore, nek onda dońĎu da razgovaraju sa mnom", dodao je.

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: The Ferrari SF90 Is a 1,000-Horsepower $700,000¬†Flagship Supercar
snippet.description:
CHECK OUT CARS & BIDS!
https://carsandbids.com

CHECK OUT FERRARI COLLECTOR DAVID LEE ON YOUTUBE!
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9GNEbV9btw2tlV96p-w6cQ

Ferrari SF90 Stradale review! The SF90 is Ferrari's newest flagship supercar, with 1,000 horsepower and a price tag of more than $650,000. The SF90 is a very special car, and today I'm reviewing the SF90 and I'll show you all the quirks and features of the SF90 Stradale. I'll also drive the SF90 Stradale and I'm going to show you what it's like on the road.

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

#KateMiddleton #PrincessBeatrice #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: OSIJEK vs DINAMO 1:1 (30.kolo, HT Prva liga 20/21)
snippet.description:
U velikom derbiju HT Prve lige, ogledu 30. kola u Gradskom vrtu, Osijek i Dinamo su remizirali odigravŇ°i 1:1. Situacija na vrhu ljestvice je tako ostala identińćna. Dinamo ima dva boda viŇ°e i jednu odigranu utakmicu manje.

Jaki udarac Dinamo je zadao Osijeku veńá u petoj minuti. Sporo je reagirala osjeńćka obrana, a pogotovo Ň†korińá, Ň°to je iskoristio Lovro Majer koji je iz blizine zakucao za 1:0 Dinama.

Igralo se krajnje otvoreno, ali je bilo primjetno kako su svi Dinamovi napadi opasniji. Odnosno, gosti iz Zagreba su bili konkretniji u samoj zavrŇ°nici. Mogao je Dinamo vrlo lako i poveńáati prednost, ali su prilike propuŇ°tali Petkovińá i Majer.

Ipak, krajem prvog poluvremena se osjetilo da se Osijek budi, a pravo izdanje domańáeg sastava vidjeli smo u nastavku. Osijek je krenuo mnogo ŇĺeŇ°ńáe i odluńćnije. Odmah je odlińćno zaprijetio Mierez glavom, ali je sjajno reagirao Livakovińá.

No, napadi Osijeka nisu jenjavali te je u 64. minuti uslijedilo izjednańćenje. Na asistenciju Kleinheislera pogodio je Erceg. Pogodak je dao Osijeku dodatnu snagu i igralo se odlińćno. Osijek je imao loptu i pritiskao, ali je Dinamo znao biti itekako opasan u kontranapadima.

MeńĎutim, mreŇĺe se viŇ°e nisu tresle pa tako nakon ovog derbija s istih pozicija oba sastava nastavljaju lov na titulu prvaka.

HT Prva liga, 30. kolo: Osijek - Dinamo 1:1 (Erceg 64./Majer 5.)

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS Stages 5-8 / WRC Croatia Rally 2021
snippet.description:
Day 1 done, Thierry Neuville is leading the first ever WRC Croatia Rally after eight stages! Twelve more stages to run, tune in on WRC+
More FREE videos, news and results at https://www.wrc.com‚Äč

Watch LIVE rally! All stages of every rally live or on demand with live cameras on stage, onboard and in the air, including expert analysis, behind the scenes stories, split times and real time GPS tracking. Thousands of onboard videos with moving maps, speed, gear, pedal and steering data, rally highlights, and exclusive videos all available on demand anytime, on any device with your subscription to WRC+ All Live.
http://www.wrcplus.com/‚Äč

Find out about the official WRC video game on PC, XBox, Playstation and Nintendo Consoles here.
https://www.wrcthegame.com‚Äč

eSports WRC Championship, is open to anyone, driving on the same roads and stages as the real-life WRC.
https://www.wrc.com/en/more/gaming/es...‚Äč

Rally Fan? Merch, clothing and more at the official shop of the FIA World Rally Championship.
https://shop.wrc.com/‚Äč

Subscribe to this YouTube Channel for exclusive, frequent new rally videos.
https://www.youtube.com/user/wrc?sub_...‚Äč

Behind the scenes and more on Facebook.
https://www.facebook.com/WorldRally‚Äč

Videos, photos, stories and competitions to win on Instagram.
https://www.instagram.com/officialwrc/‚Äč

News, results, photos, videos on Twitter.
https://twitter.com/OfficialWRC‚Äč

The WRC is the FIA World Rally Championship, a tough motorsport using rally cars on real roads around the world. Watch the best rally drivers battle on gravel and asphalt roads with mud, rain, dust, ice and heat! Watch high speed action as the rally drivers power slide and drift round narrow corners, go flat out over a big jump or through a watersplash, handbrake turn round a hairpin, survive a big moment, or have a massive crash! Rally requires maximum attack and careful tactics to become world rally champion.

Each rally has timed sections called special stages, on closed roads. Drivers complete these stages as quickly as possible. A co-driver reads pace notes that explain the hazards ahead. Rally drivers use the same rally car to travel to each stage on public roads, following normal traffic regulations. The crew which completes all the stages in the shortest time is the rally winner. Championship points are won using the same scoring system as Formula 1. The championship is administered by F√©d√©ration Internationale de l'Automobile (FIA), motorsport's world governing body.

Over 30 countries have hosted WRC rallies. Rally Monte Carlo, Rally Argentina, Rally Finland, Rally Portugal, Tour de Corse on Corsica, France, Rally Sardegna on Sardinia, Italy, Safari Rally in Kenya, Acropolis Rally in Greece, Rally New Zealand, Rally Australia, Rally Japan, Rally GB, Rally Catalunya, Rallye Deutschland, Rally Mexico and many more.

Some of the world's greatest drivers have won the FIA World Rally Championship for Drivers, like Colin McRae, Carlos Sainz, Walter R√∂hrl, Stig Blomqvist, Petter Solberg, Ott T√§nak. The list of world rally champions includes many Finnish rally drivers like Juha Kankkunen, Tommi M√§kinen, Ari Vatanen, Marcus Gr√∂nholm, Hannu Mikkola. French drivers have had success with S√©bastien Ogier, and 9 times world champion S√©bastien Loeb. Famous drivers from other motorsports have come to try rally driving like Ken Block from Rallycross, and Robert Kubica and Kimi R√§ikk√∂nen from F1.

Car companies compete for the prestigious FIA World Rally Championship for Manufacturers awarded to the most successful WRC constructor. Winners include Citroen, Hyundai, Volkswagen and Peugeot. Ford have had success with the Ford Escort, Ford Focus and Ford Fiesta when the M-Sport team won in 2017.
The 1980's featured the iconic Group B rally cars like the Lancia 037 and Delta S4, Peugeot 205 T16, MG Metro 6R4, Ford RS200 and Audi Quattro.
Japan dominated the 1990s with the Mitsubishi Lancer, Subaru Impreza, and Toyota Celica and Toyota Corolla. Toyota returned to the WRC in 2017 with the Toyota Yaris WRC, winning in 2018 and 2020. The 2019 championship was won by Hyundai with the Hyundai i20 Coupe WRC. Find out about the latest winners and champions at https://www.wrc.com

snippet.title: The Absolute State of Affairs
snippet.description:
This has to be my all-time favourite recipe! I make this every day for my 16 children, 4 husbands, 3 wives, 18 ex-husbands, 24 ex-wives, my mother, father, 48 step-dads, 39 step-mums, my 17 brothers and 20 sisters, my 4 half brothers, 6 step-brothers, 3 half-sisters, 4 step-sisters, my 15 cats, 25 dogs, 3 alligators, 58 cows, 7 chickens, 8 hamsters, 14 rats, 47 best friends, 164 colleagues, my 4 bosses, all 83 clients of mine, all my ancestors, that squirrel outside, the man looking in from my window, the girl in my bathtub, and the thing in the basement. It‚Äôs really simple and easy to make so I really love giving it to as many as I can!

Oh! how could I have forgotten! Silly me, here is a link to the recipeūü§ó: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OBpanKeu6cM&list=LL&index=1

lots of love,
Jhris Cansen

snippet.title: Iz Slovenije s ljubavlju - Srbija do Une, Hrvatska do Drine
snippet.description:
Otkud sad ovaj dokument za koji samo Edi Rama priznaje da ga je video, da li zaista dolazi od Janeza JanŇ°e ili je iza neko mnogo bitniji?

Kad se Jugoslavija raspadala on je bio slovenańćki ministar odbrane; sad kad je Janez JanŇ°a premijer Slovenije ponovo se govori o promeni granica na prostorima bivŇ°e Jugoslavije. I to sve zbog navodnog nezvanińćnog dokumenta koji je potekao iz Slovenije a koji predvińĎa ujedinjenje Srbije i Republike Srpske, Albanije i Kosova, Hrvatske i Zapadne Hercegovine gde veńáinski Ňĺive u Hrvati. Otkud sad ovaj dokument, za koji samo Edi Rama priznaje da ga je video, da li zaista dolazi od JanŇ°e ili je iza neko bitniji i koliko je uopŇ°te realna nova promena granica?
Prvi je to proŇ°le godine uradio tadaŇ°nji amerińćki predsednik Donald Tramp. Dva puta su Amerikanci dobili direktne uplate na rańćun. Prvi put 1.200, a drugi put 600 dolara. Vrlo brzo posle Amerike i Srbija se odluńćila na ovaj korak i u junu proŇ°le godine svaki grańĎanin Srbije koji je to Ňĺeleo dobio je 100 evra iz helikoptera. ZaŇ°to se ovaj novac zove helikopter mani, da li u Srbiji ima iste efekte kao i u Americi i zaŇ°to se nova tranŇ°a koja se sprema i u Americi ali i u Srbiji sve ńćeŇ°ńáe zove dron mani?

U Oko magazinu pogledajte i razgovor sa nekadaŇ°njim pevańćem Bijelog dugmeta Alenom Islamovińáem.

Urednik emisije: Gorislav Papińá
Label and copyright: RTS

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click¬†https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow¬†and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check this out, RS6 fans - we‚Äôve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, we‚Äôre here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As you‚Äôd expect, Mat‚Äôs in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, we‚Äôve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although it‚Äôs also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider it‚Äôs powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, it‚Äôs surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, there‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.title: First Flight of the Ingenuity Mars Helicopter: Live from Mission Control
snippet.description: Up, up, and away! The Ingenuity #MarsHelicopter is set to make history. It will make the first attempt at powered flight on another planet on Monday, April 19. Don‚Äôt miss your chance to watch live with helicopter team in mission control beginning at 6:15 a.m. EDT (10:15 a.m. UTC) as they receive the data and find out if they were successful.

snippet.title: Do we Need Nuclear Energy to Stop Climate Change?
snippet.description:
The first 1000 people to use this link will get a free trial of Skillshare:

Do we need nuclear energy to stop climate change? snippet.title: Jury finds Derek Chauvin guilty of murder in death of George Floyd - 4/20 (FULL LIVE STREAM)
snippet.description:
The jury found former Minneapolis police officer Derek Chauvin guilty of second and third-degree murder and second-degree manslaughter in the May 25, 2020, killing of George Floyd.

The verdict comes after two weeks of witnesses and experts examining Floyd‚Äôs death and Chauvin‚Äôs use of force. Judge Peter Cahill has allowed the proceedings to be broadcast live, which was a first in Minnesota history for a criminal trial. 

The Post‚Äôs Libby Casey will anchor live coverage featuring reporters throughout the country ‚ÄĒ including Mary Beth Albright, Keith Alexander, Rhonda Colvin, Nicole Ellis, Robert Samuels and Eugene Scott. From Minneapolis, Holly Bailey, Hannah Jewell and Joyce Koh will deliver insights from the courthouse. Plus, columnist James Hohmann will add his analysis. Read more: https://wapo.st/3gqheW1. Subscribe to The Washington Post on YouTube: https://wapo.st/2QOdcqK

Follow us:
Twitter: https://twitter.com/washingtonpost
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/washingtonpost/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/washingtonpost/

snippet.title: How Russell seriously upset Mercedes in huge Bottas F1 crash
snippet.description:
When the F1 stewards declared the massive accident between George Russell and Valtteri Bottas at Imola a racing incident, that could have been the end of it. But both drivers didn‚Äôt want to leave it there, and Mercedes boss Toto Wolff even voiced his displeasure. Against a backdrop of Mercedes‚Äô uncertain 2022 driver line-up plans - which will affect both Bottas and Russell next year - Scott Mitchell explains all the key details of what happened during the crash and why the post-race fallout was so acrimonious

#F1 #Russell #Bottas #Mercedes

snippet.title: Introducing AirTag | Couch | Apple
snippet.description:
AirTag. Keep track of your keys, wallet, luggage, backpack, and more, all in the Find My app. Play a sound on the built-in speaker, or say ‚ÄúHey Siri, find my gym bag.‚ÄĚ With select iPhone models, Precision Finding can lead you right to your nearby AirTag. If it‚Äôs farther away, hundreds of millions of Apple devices in the Find My network can help track it down. All anonymously and encrypted for privacy. Because we‚Äôre all human, and we‚Äôre a lot better at losing things than we are at finding them.

Learn more: http://apple.com/AirTag

'Aquarium (Improvisation after Le Carnaval des animaux by Camille Saint-Sa√ęns)' - Thomas Enhco, Vassilena Serafimova & Camille Saint-Sa√ęns http://apple.co/Aquarium

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Farma Vukovińá ima ovna s najveńáim rogovima
snippet.description:
PridruŇĺite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join
Farma Vukovińá iz Potkraja kod Travnika slovi za jednu od najveńáih i najsuvremenijih u kantonu SrediŇ°nja Bosna. Kontinuirano ulaŇĺu u genetski razvoj stada, suvremene strojeve koji olakŇ°avaju rad na farmi te obradu zapuŇ°tenih njiva i livada. Vlasnik Drago Vukovińá izgradio je poslovnu filozofiju koja se temelji na domańáim resursima. ViŇ°e od 90 posto hrane za svoj stońćni fond Drago proizvodi sa domańáih njiva koje su nekada bile zapuŇ°tene i zarasle u korov. Danas sa iste zemlje ubire Ňĺitarice, djetelinu i sijeno vrhunske kvalitete. ViŇ°e pogledajte u prilogu.

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack Snyder‚Äôs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero who‚Äôs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), it‚Äôs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thing‚Äôs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias Schweigh√∂fer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, Ra√ļl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXy‚Äč
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0E‚Äč
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh ūüėā ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/
